title: Explained: SEBI's allegations of ₹15 lakh crore inflated revenue against Rajesh Exports
description: Rajesh Exports Limited (REL), a listed gold refiner and holding entity of SHUBH Jewellers, appears to have misrepresented its revenues during a five year-period from FY 2020-21 till FY 2024-25 to project an inflated ₹15.44 lakh crore cumulative revenue, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) recently said.The SEBI made the observation in an order restraining Rajesh Exports promoter and Executive Chairman Rajesh Mehta from buying, selling or dealing in the securities of the company unt
